solara.name: Solara Basin
solara.description: The safe starting world. Balanced yields, light infrastructure, and a stable environment to learn the basics.

ferros.name: Ferros Cradle
ferros.description: A metallic world where ferrite veins are dense but fuel-bearing deposits are scarce.

verdara.name: Verdara Drift
verdara.description: A volatile atmosphere makes oxygen easy to harvest and ferrite harder to pull cleanly.

cinder.name: Cinder Span
cinder.description: An ash-choked furnace planet where carbon is plentiful and everything else fights back.
